translations: And say My Lord Cause me to enter
an entrance sound and cause me to exit
puzzle.hint: A supplication for righteous beginnings and endings, and for divine help and authority in one's affairs.
puzzle.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَدْخِلْنِى مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍۢ وَأَخْرِجْنِى مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍۢ وَٱجْعَل لِّى مِن لَّدُنكَ سُلْطَـٰنًۭا نَّصِيرًۭا
puzzle.verseEn: And say, "My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority."
